name: Do Your Canned Foods Pass This Test?
recipeInstructions:
1. Check the overall appearance:
- Good proportion of solid to liquid
- Full pack with proper headspace
- Liquid just covering solid
- Free of air bubbles and imperfections (stems, cores, seeds)
- Good seals
- Practical packaging that is done quickly and easily
2. Examine the fruits and vegetables:
- Pieces uniform in size and shape
- Characteristic, uniform color
- Shape retained - not broken or mushy
- Proper maturity
3. Inspect the liquid or syrup:
- Clear and free from sediment
